rule.APPROVE: in BOTH modes: (K* >= 2 in >= 80% of cells) AND (median dR >= +0.10)
rule.NULL: anything else (modes disagree, or the K* mass straddles) - a legitimate reportable outcome: the verdict names the flip axis via per-value K*>=2 cell-shares (largest spread = the named boundary; expected candidates: audience separation s and selection fidelity f)
rule.REJECT: in BOTH modes: K* = 1 in >= 80% of cells
rule.median_definition: sorted ascending, element at 0-based index 40 of the 81 per-cell dR values (81 odd - exact)
